bash.name: Bash Shell Integration
bash.description: Execute shell commands for system operations, testing, and deployment
args: const readline = require('readline'); const rl = readline.createInterface({input: process.stdin, output: process.stdout}); rl.on('line', (line) => {console.log(JSON.stringify({status: 'received', command: line}))});

codebase.name: Codebase Inspector
codebase.description: Inspect and analyze the project structure, dependencies, and code patterns
args: const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); function analyzeDir(dir, depth = 0, maxDepth = 3) {if (depth > maxDepth) return []; const items = []; try {const entries = fs.readdirSync(dir); entries.forEach(entry => {if (['.git', 'node_modules', '.vs', '.vscode', 'bin', 'obj', 'dist', '.mcp', 'coverage'].includes(entry)) return; const fullPath = path.join(dir, entry); const stat = fs.statSync(fullPath); items.push({name: entry, path: fullPath, isDirectory: stat.isDirectory(), size: stat.size}); if (stat.isDirectory()) items.push(...analyzeDir(fullPath, depth + 1, maxDepth));});} catch (e) {console.error('Error:', e.message);} return items;} console.log(JSON.stringify({project: analyzeDir(process.cwd())}, null, 2));

git.name: Git Version Control
git.description: Manage git operations including commits, branches, and log inspection
args: const { spawn } = require('child_process'); const rl = require('readline').createInterface({input: process.stdin}); rl.on('line', (cmd) => {const child = spawn('git', cmd.split(' '), {cwd: process.env.GIT_REPO || '.'}); let output = ''; child.stdout.on('data', (d) => {output += d.toString();}); child.on('close', (code) => {console.log(JSON.stringify({command: cmd, exitCode: code, output: output}));});});

dotnet.name: .NET Development Tools
dotnet.description: Build, test, and deploy .NET application with CLI operations
args: const { spawn } = require('child_process'); const rl = require('readline').createInterface({input: process.stdin}); rl.on('line', (cmd) => {const args = cmd.split(' '); const tool = args[0]; const params = args.slice(1); const child = spawn(tool, params, {cwd: process.env.DOTNET_PROJECT_PATH || '.'}); let output = ''; let error = ''; child.stdout.on('data', (d) => {output += d.toString();}); child.stderr.on('data', (d) => {error += d.toString();}); child.on('close', (code) => {console.log(JSON.stringify({tool: tool, exitCode: code, output: output, error: error}));});});

npm.name: Node Package Manager
npm.description: Manage npm packages, dependencies, and frontend build operations
args: const { spawn } = require('child_process'); const rl = require('readline').createInterface({input: process.stdin}); rl.on('line', (cmd) => {const args = cmd.split(' '); const child = spawn('npm', args, {cwd: process.env.NPM_PROJECT_PATH || '.', stdio: 'pipe'}); let output = ''; child.stdout.on('data', (d) => {output += d.toString();}); child.on('close', (code) => {console.log(JSON.stringify({command: 'npm ' + cmd, exitCode: code, output: output}));});});

docker.name: Docker Container Management
docker.description: Build, run, and manage Docker containers and images for the application stack
args: const { spawn } = require('child_process'); const rl = require('readline').createInterface({input: process.stdin}); rl.on('line', (cmd) => {const args = cmd.split(' '); const child = spawn('docker', args, {cwd: process.env.DOCKER_CONTEXT || '.'}); let output = ''; child.stdout.on('data', (d) => {output += d.toString();}); child.on('close', (code) => {console.log(JSON.stringify({command: 'docker ' + cmd, exitCode: code, output: output}));});});

settings.description: DevWiki MCP Configuration - Integrates Claude with development tools

analyze-structure.description: Analyze the entire project structure and dependencies

run-tests.description: Run all unit tests with code coverage

git-status.description: Check git repository status and recent commits

docker-compose-up.description: Start the full application stack with Docker Compose

docker-compose-down.description: Stop and remove the Docker Compose stack
